title: PvPLegacy Icons
description:
Adds custom icons to PvPLegacy
('OptiFine' or 'CIT Resewn' required)
body:
**[OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) is required!**
<details>
<summary>Changes the renamed Minecraft items to custom-made icons on PvPLegacy!</summary>

Before:

![With resource pack off](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fSijj5Do/images/448ed0174704b32d52b07b056d50877b719794ed.png)

After:

![With resource pack on](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/fSijj5Do/images/2ccc717a9fe5802d316e14690f0329803e14e191.png)

</details>

---

**Changes icons for:**
- Hotbar items
    - Server Selector
    - Game Selector
    - Kit Creator
    - Game Statistics
        - Total time played
        - Online
        - Offline
    - Settings
---
- Kit Creator
    - Next page
    - Back
    - Invalid symbol
    - Share Kit
    - Change Map
    - Custom Settings
        - \# (Number input)
            - Invalid number
            - Custom Amount
        - Max Rounds
        - Survival Mode
        - Natural Regeneration
        - Hunger
        - Rain
        - Worldborder Time
        - Enderpearl Cooldown
        - Arrow pickup
        - Item drops
        - Absolute projectiles
        - Auto Ignition
        - Show Health
    - Guide
    - Reset Kit
    - Change the name of kit

---

Made for the server play.pvplegacy.net (this pack is unofficial)
